## Summary

Describe the user-visible or research outcome in 2–4 sentences.

## Linked issue or milestone

- Issue:
- Roadmap milestone:

## Evidence and implementation notes

List important sources, assumptions, uncertainty, architectural choices, or intentionally excluded work.

## Validation

- [ ] Scope matches the issue or milestone.
- [ ] Content sources were reviewed.
- [ ] Unknown values were not guessed.
- [ ] Schema validation passes.
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes.
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `npm run build` passes.
- [ ] Browser behavior was checked.
- [ ] Mobile behavior was checked.
- [ ] Accessibility was checked.
- [ ] `docs/PROJECT_STATE.md` was updated or is not affected.
- [ ] `docs/CHANGELOG.md` was updated or is not affected.
- [ ] Screenshots are included for visual changes or are not applicable.

## Screenshots

Add desktop and mobile images for visual changes.

## Remaining risks or follow-ups

List known limitations, deferred work, or “None.”
